---
title: "play_with_git"
format: html
---

# Use this to play with git and github

Add something new


---------------------------------
SHEY WAS HERE
---------------------------------

xyzabc

# Creating a new branch
# in terminal, type git branch to see list and current position
# to create a new branch, type: git branch new_name
# to switch to a different branch, type: git checkout branch_name


# push and pull are always from the master branch, not your side branch

# if you are working on something that is not ready for others to use yet, do it in a separate branch so that others can't pull your draft work

# Instead of a merge, you can also rebase (instead of 1+2 and 3+4 becoming 10, it becomes 1+2+3+4)


# When you want to merge, 

adding a line to the branchpractice side
